brand_identity.name: Thompson Square Medical Centre
brand_identity.primary_focus: Family healthcare and walk-in clinic focused on human-centered care and friction reduction.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-medium tracking-tight text-[#1A2E24]

rules: Avoid 'Inter' for headings. Use Outfit for a human-centered, modern feel.
Left-align dense text blocks. Center align only for small, impactful sections like hero overlays if appropriate.
Never exceed text-6xl for hero headings.
Avoid sterile clinic blues and stark whites. Rely on warm bone-white (#F9F8F6) and sage greens to create trust.
Primary brand color (#4A7A61) is strictly for CTAs and critical highlights.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing (Tailwind p-6, p-12, py-24) to create a relaxed, unhurried atmosphere.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Bento Grid Mode A: Asymmetrical grids with empty space. Avoid standard rigid bootstrap columns.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl to rounded-3xl to soften the interface and make it approachable.

components_strategy.header: Sticky nav with crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F8F6]/80, border-b border-white/40). Includes Logo, Links, and 'Call Now' CTA.
components_strategy.hero: Split asymmetrical layout. Copy on the left, soft-edged imagery on the right. Must feature 'Accepting New Patients & Walk-ins Welcome'.
components_strategy.modal_popup: Shadcn Dialog. Glassmorphism overlay (bg-black/20 backdrop-blur-sm). Triggered on load. Title: 'Welcome to Thompson Square Medical Centre'. CTA: 'Call to Book' or 'Get Directions'.
components_strategy.services_grid: Soft neumorphism or flat cards with 1px delicate border (border-[#EAF0EC]) and soft background colors. Lift on hover.
components_strategy.doctor_profile: Side-by-side asymmetrical layout. Generous padding. Photo of Dr. Aliya Ali with rounded corners.
components_strategy.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Explicit hover states (e.g., hover:bg-[#3D6651] hover:text-white).

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Interactive elements must lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and cast a diffuse shadow (shadow-sm).
motion_and_interaction.entrance: Staggered fade-in for lists and grids.
motion_and_interaction.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure focus states are obvious (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4A7A61]).

doctor_headshot.description: Dr. Aliya Ali professional headshot on white background

clinic_waiting_room.description: Modern waiting room with comfortable chairs and soft lighting
clinic_waiting_room.usage: Hero section background or About the clinic visual

reception_desk.description: Patient consulting receptionist in modern clinic

doctor_patient_interaction.description: Compassionate doctor interaction with female patient

testing.attributes: All interactive elements, buttons, and important text MUST use data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-call').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a responsive, single-page React application with Tailwind CSS based on these guidelines.
Use Shadcn Dialog component for the initial Welcome modal popup.
Incorporate the required sections: Hero, Services Grid (Medical Services, Preventive Care, Women's Health, Pediatric Services), Meet Your Doctor, About, Testimonials, Hours & Location.
In the Hours & Location section, include a visually appealing Google Maps link or iframe integration with a clear 'Get Directions' button.
Ensure 'Accepting New Patients + Walk-ins Welcome' is visible immediately above the fold.
Adhere to the 'Organic & Earthy' archetype palette for a compassionate and trustworthy feel.
Do not include backend form submissions. Make CTAs redirect to a call protocol (tel:) or map directions.
